name: PactFlow
description: Managed Pact Broker from SmartBear offering contract testing, bi-directional contracts with OpenAPI, and AI-assisted test creation for microservices.

seo.title: PactFlow — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: PactFlow: Managed Pact Broker from SmartBear offering contract testing, bi-directional contracts with OpenAPI, and AI-assisted test creation for microservices.

when_to_use: Managed Pact Broker with bi-directional contract testing
OpenAPI + consumer pact comparison for API compatibility
AI-assisted contract test generation from API specs
Can-I-Deploy gate in CI preventing breaking deployments

pros: Managed Pact Broker removes hosting burden
cons: Paid SaaS vs free self-hosted Pact Broker
Vendor lock-in on top of open-source Pact
Pricing scales with pacticipants, gets expensive
review.verdict: Worth paying for if contract testing is central to your microservice strategy and you hate running infra.
review.best_for: Enterprises with many microservices who want managed contract testing
review.not_for: Small teams content self-hosting the open-source Pact Broker
